# Origin Marketing Site

> Origin is a developer platform that measures how coding agents and LLMs recommend your product, then automatically ships fixes (such as pull requests, documentation updates, and `llms.txt` optimizations) to win AI recommendation share.

This repository contains the source code for the Origin marketing and landing website. It is built using Next.js 16 (App Router), React 19, TypeScript, and TailwindCSS v4. It features a technical, engineering-led neo-brutalist visual aesthetic.

## Tech Stack & Architecture

- **Core Framework**: Next.js 16 (App Router) & React 19
- **Styling**: TailwindCSS v4 with CSS custom variables, custom typography, animations, and transitions managed in `globals.css`.
- **Aesthetic Principles**: Strictly rectilinear (`0px` border-radius), monochrome bases with high-visibility engineering orange (`#e8662a`) accents, and CAD/blueprint-inspired fading grid backgrounds.
- **Scroll & Interactions**: Lenis smooth scroll and GSAP (GreenSock Animation Platform) timeline/scroll animations.
- **Icons**: Lucide React and React Icons.

## Key Files

- [package.json](file:///Users/aparupganguly/developer/origin-marketing-site/package.json): Root configuration containing the scripts (`dev`, `build`, `start`, `lint`) and dependencies.
- [DESIGN_SYSTEM.md](file:///Users/aparupganguly/developer/origin-marketing-site/DESIGN_SYSTEM.md): The single source of truth for the Origin design language, specifying color tokens, typography scales, layout rules, component specifications, and main app migration guidelines.
- [app/page.tsx](file:///Users/aparupganguly/developer/origin-marketing-site/app/page.tsx): Main landing page featuring a CAD-blueprint grid layout, interactive odd/even column sweep hover effects, capability cards, and integrations section.
- [app/globals.css](file:///Users/aparupganguly/developer/origin-marketing-site/app/globals.css): Global styles, custom CSS utilities, layout line grid animations, code diff highlighter theme, and monospace/grotesk font bindings.
- [app/layout.tsx](file:///Users/aparupganguly/developer/origin-marketing-site/app/layout.tsx): Root layout setting up custom metadata, viewport headers, and wrapping children with Geist fonts and smooth scrolling.

## Components

- [components/explainer-mockup.tsx](file:///Users/aparupganguly/developer/origin-marketing-site/components/explainer-mockup.tsx): A simulated high-density dashboard mockup showcasing real-time opportunities, code diff visualizers, file system directories, and agent execution logs.
- [components/signal-architecture.tsx](file:///Users/aparupganguly/developer/origin-marketing-site/components/signal-architecture.tsx): Node-network diagram showing how GitHub codebases connect to models (Claude, Gemini, ChatGPT) and search engines.
- [components/visibility-graph.tsx](file:///Users/aparupganguly/developer/origin-marketing-site/components/visibility-graph.tsx): Custom SVG line chart plotting recommendation share metrics over time.
- [components/cta-button.tsx](file:///Users/aparupganguly/developer/origin-marketing-site/components/cta-button.tsx): Reusable button adhering to neo-brutalist aesthetics (custom orange indicator dot, translation animations).
- [components/faq-accordion.tsx](file:///Users/aparupganguly/developer/origin-marketing-site/components/faq-accordion.tsx): Expandable accordion grid component handling smooth height transitions for Q&A section.
- [components/surface-icon.tsx](file:///Users/aparupganguly/developer/origin-marketing-site/components/surface-icon.tsx): SVG wrapper displaying custom brand/platform logos (Cursor, Claude, Gemini, ChatGPT, Perplexity).
- [components/smooth-scroll.tsx](file:///Users/aparupganguly/developer/origin-marketing-site/components/smooth-scroll.tsx): React wrapper initializing Lenis scroll configuration.
- [components/theme-init.tsx](file:///Users/aparupganguly/developer/origin-marketing-site/components/theme-init.tsx): Inline script checking and applying local/system dark mode classes.

## Optional & Configuration

- [tsconfig.json](file:///Users/aparupganguly/developer/origin-marketing-site/tsconfig.json): Compiler rules and absolute import aliases (`@/*`).
- [next.config.ts](file:///Users/aparupganguly/developer/origin-marketing-site/next.config.ts): Next.js build-time configurations.
- [eslint.config.mjs](file:///Users/aparupganguly/developer/origin-marketing-site/eslint.config.mjs): Static code linting configurations.
- [postcss.config.mjs](file:///Users/aparupganguly/developer/origin-marketing-site/postcss.config.mjs): PostCSS build pipeline settings.
